name: Hilton Honors American Express Card

welcome_offer.description: Earn 70,000 Hilton Honors Bonus Points plus a Free Night Reward after spending $2,000 on eligible purchases within the first 6 months of card membership. Offer ends 4/15/26.

earning_rates.notes: Hilton Honors Bonus Points per dollar at hotels and resorts within the Hilton portfolio

hotel_status.method: Automatic for as long as card is open
Earned by spending $20,000 on eligible purchases in a calendar year (valid through end of next calendar year)

other_benefits.name: Fifth Night Free
other_benefits.description: Fifth night free on reward stays (all Honors members)

other_benefits.name: No Foreign Transaction Fees
other_benefits.description: No fees on purchases made outside the United States

sources.notes: Current welcome offer 70K points + Free Night after $2K spend in 6 months, ends 4/15/26
Earning rates and status benefits including Silver automatic and Gold with $20K spend
New limited-time offer details confirmed from March 2026 update

notes: The no-annual-fee Hilton card is a solid entry-level hotel credit card. The new limited-time welcome offer adds a Free Night Reward (up to 250,000 points) alongside the 70K bonus points. No Priority Pass or travel protections beyond basic purchase/extended warranty. Gold status at $20K annual spend is a reasonable goal for moderate spenders. Foreign transaction fee is $0, making it useful for international travel despite being a no-AF card.
